standard: DM 5/11/2001 n.6792 Norme funzionali e geometriche
notes: Official MIT (mit.gov.it) PDF. 96 pages = full decree text PLUS the technical-norms annex. Annex/geometric tables CONFIRMED present: design speed (velocita di progetto) on ~27 pages, minimum radii (raggio) on ~22 pages, gradients (pendenza), clothoid/clotoide on pp.69-77, carreggiata widths, rettifilo min-length table verified by text extraction. Linked from https://www.mit.gov.it/normativa/decreto-ministeriale-numero-6792-del-05112001 . An identical file (same sha256) is also served from the sister page .../protocollo-6792-del-05112001 (.../2017-09/decreto_ministeriale_protocollo_6792_del_5-11-2001.pdf); duplicate deleted.
